ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight ABC123
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Thank you for booking your journey with XYZ Airlines. Please find your flight itinerary details below:

• Flight Number: ABC123
• Departure: Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (DEL)
• Date: 20th May 2026
• Time: 10:15 AM (Indian Standard Time)

• Arrival: Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (BLR)
• Time: 01:45 PM (Indian Standard Time)

Your e‑ticket is attached to this email. Kindly review the information and keep a copy for your records.

If you need to make any changes or have special assistance requirements, please contact our customer support at +91-80-1234-5678 or reply to this email.

We wish you a pleasant journey!

Warm regards,

XYZ Airlines Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Gift Card Request for CEO
spam.body:
Namaste Rajesh,

I am Ananya Mehta from the Finance Department of XYZ Corp. We have noticed that the CEO’s gift card balance is critically low and an immediate replenishment is required for upcoming corporate gifting.

Please process a new gift card worth ₹50,000 at the earliest. Click the button below to confirm the transaction:

<URL>

This is a time‑sensitive request from the CEO himself. Your prompt action will be appreciated.

Thank you,

Ananya Mehta
Finance Department
XYZ Corp.
